name: Workato
description: Monitor Workato enterprise integration platform for automation access and workflow security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Workato
2. Go to Workspace Admin > API Clients
3. Create an API Client with appropriate client role
4. Copy the API token
5. Select your data center URL (US: https://www.workato.com, EU: https://app.eu.workato.com, etc.)
6. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Data Center
credentialFields.helpText: Your Workato data center base URL (e.g., https://www.workato.com for US, https://app.eu.workato.com for EU, https://app.jp.workato.com for JP, https://app.sg.workato.com for SG, https://app.au.workato.com for AU)

credentialFields.label: API Client Token
credentialFields.helpText: API Client token from Workspace Admin > API Clients. Requires appropriate client role.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Workato team members with access to integration automation workflows

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Workato integration automation platform is operational
